query:
ALTER TABLE users DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS passwordHash, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS loginMethod, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS providerType, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS userType, DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS lastSignedIn;

ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN passwordHash VARCHAR(255) NULL,
ADD COLUMN loginMethod VARCHAR(64) NULL,
ADD COLUMN providerType ENUM('nurse', 'doctor', 'pharmacist', 'paramedic', 'lab_tech', 'respiratory_therapist', 'midwife', 'other') NULL,
ADD COLUMN userType ENUM('individual', 'institutional', 'parent') DEFAULT 'individual',
ADD COLUMN lastSignedIn TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN passwordHash VARCHAR(255) NULL,
ADD COLUMN loginMethod VARCHAR(64) NULL,
ADD COLUMN providerType ENUM('nurse', 'doctor', 'pharmacist', 'paramedic', 'lab_tech', 'respiratory_therapist', 'midwife', 'other') NULL,
ADD COLUMN userType ENUM('individual', 'institutional', 'parent') DEFAULT 'individual',
ADD COLUMN lastSignedIn TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
